mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly positive during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 6.0 percent, it signals severe labor market deterioration and imminent recession risk, triggering institutional deleveraging and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day forward returns occur in more than 55 percent of triggered instances during late-cycle expansions.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with falling inflation indicates strong consumer demand without pricing pressure, supporting corporate margin expansion and driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a lower information coefficient than either series used independently over a 24-month out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production below its six-month moving average signals supply-side contraction, triggering short-term risk-off flows and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns are positive in more than 60 percent of triggered cases during monetary tightening cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth exceeding two percent annualized confirms macroeconomic expansion, reinforcing earnings expectations and generating positive forward equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Cumulative 60-day returns are negative in more than 50 percent of quarters with GDPC1 growth above two percent annualized.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading above three point five percent triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: The market rallies more than two percent within twenty days of CPIAUCSL exceeding three point five in more than sixty-five percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous nonfarm payrolls growth exceeding one hundred fifty thousand and unemployment decline below four point five percent confirms robust labor expansion, driving short-term positive equity momentum.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns are negative in more than fifty-five percent of concurrent trigger events during early-cycle recoveries.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below one point two million units signals a housing market downturn, which historically precedes broader consumer spending weakness and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Twenty-day forward returns are positive in more than sixty percent of instances when HOUST falls below one point two million during credit-constrained regimes.
